FeatureDimension.description: A dimension in a competitive feature matrix.

dimension_meta.description: Per-dimension metadata (keys are dimension IDs, values are priority/config).

PathRef.description:
Path-based cross-reference relative to .corpospec/ root.
Pattern: `^[a-z0-9_-]+(/[a-z0-9_.-]+)+$`

description: Feature matrix defining competitive comparison dimensions.

our_features.description:
PathRefs to `ProductFeature` records that populate the "our column" of
the matrix. Keeps the feature inventory (`product/features/*.yaml`) as
the single source of truth instead of duplicating feature names on
every matrix dimension. Competitors' feature presence is scored per
dimension on each `Competitor` record separately.

title: FeatureMatrix
